Poker Hand #RC1000003: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02) - 2026/05/21 03:01:00
Table 'TestTable' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 ($2 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain2 ($2 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain3 ($2 in chips)
Seat 4: Villain4 ($2 in chips)
Seat 5: Hero ($2 in chips)
Seat 6: Villain5 ($2 in chips)
Villain2: posts small blind $0.01
Villain3: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [As Ac]
Villain4: raises $0.04 to $0.06
Hero: raises $0.18 to $0.24
Villain5: folds
Villain1: folds
Villain2: folds
Villain3: folds
Villain4: folds
Uncalled bet ($0.18) returned to Hero
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Hero collected $0.13 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.15 | Rake $0.02 | Jackpot $0 | Bingo $0 | Fortune $0 | Tax $0
Seat 1: Villain1 (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: Villain2 (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: Villain3 (big blind) folded before Flop
Seat 4: Villain4 folded before Flop
Seat 5: Hero collected ($0.13)
Seat 6: Villain5 folded before Flop (didn't bet)
